title: Don't play nice, pay the price
description: Uses mixin to fixes issues in other mods which are often overlooked.
body:
# Don't play nice, pay the price

Mixin fixes for mods I use in my pack, since sometimes they don't play nicely.

Current fixes include:

*   Gadgets n' Goodies
    *   Fixes Jetpack, game won't crash anymore
    *   Removes "Hai 5" debug message on client console while flying
*   Grim Pack
    *   Make Grave more blast resistant, similar to OpenBlocks
*   Minecraft Comes Alive
    *   Remove update & supporter check
*   SignPictures
    *   Remove update check
*   Secret Rooms (as of 1.1.0)
    *   Remove update check
*   Raw Input - Blessed Edition (as of 1.2.0)
    *   Disable the mod if CleanroomMC is used.
*   Fullscreen Windowed (as of 1.2.0)
    *   Disable the mod if CleanroomMC is used.

Also adds the following features:

*   Config options for all mentioned fixes
*   Config option to show count of active coremods on title screen
*   Config option to hide all modded branding on title screen
